title: Senior Software Engineer - ABB India International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ABB India International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India International Enterprises in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
